description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and deploy, and set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. In the build stage add an apk job using the image registry.gitlab.com/tales/tales-client-ci:android-34 that runs export VERSION_NUMBER=$(git log --pretty=oneline | wc -l), sed -i \"s/ANDROID_VERSION_CODE = .*/ANDROID_VERSION_CODE = $VERSION_NUMBER/\" example/example.pro, conditionally decodes $ANDROID_KEYSTORE_FILE to android_release.keystore and exports KEYSTORE, then executes ./ci-build-apk.sh, and publishes the APK files matching install/build/outputs/apk/*/*.apk as artifacts. Also in the build stage add an appimage job using the image registry.gitlab.com/tales/tales-client-ci:qt-linux that runs ./ci-build-appimage.sh and stores files matching Source_of_Tales-*.AppImage as artifacts. In the deploy stage add a gplay job using the node:18 image that only runs on the master branch, decodes $SERVICE_JSON to /service.json, runs npm install apkup@1.3.1, and uploads the signed APK with npx apkup --key /service.json --track alpha --apk install/build/outputs/apk/release/install-release-signed.apk to Google Play.
